summary: Admin customers filter-empty state displays correctly on mobile narrow viewport. Shows proper heading, search/filter controls, and the required 'No customers match the current filters.' message. Dark admin UI palette is appropriately distinct from public marketing surfaces.

violations.description: Search input shows placeholder 'atch-zz*' which appears to be test data rather than a user-friendly placeholder like 'Search customers...'

actions: Consider using more intuitive placeholder text in search inputs for better UX
